description: Chancery decree in large Arabic script. Only the left half of a single line has been preserved. Yusuf Umrethwala's suggested reading: السجل لك باستخدامك في مشارفة كله للـ[ـعساكر؟] لمصـ[ر؟, "decree for you, appointing you to the complete supervision of [the army]."
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
